scripts.setup: npm install --prefix apps/anirate-base/backend && npm install --prefix apps/anirate-base/frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:fresh: npm run stop && npm run dev
scripts.ports:status: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$ports = 3000,3001,3002,3003,3004,3005,4000; $connections = @(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $ports -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalPort, OwningProcess | Sort-Object LocalPort); if ($connections.Count -eq 0) { Write-Host 'No dev ports are currently in use.' } else { $connections | Format-Table -AutoSize }"
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
